'''Giza''' was a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] who fought alongside [[General/Legends|General]] [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Tiatkin]] on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Radix]] during their campaign against the [[Eiattu pirates]]. He and Tiatkin flew one of the transports to Radix. He was a large and powerful war droid of unknown type, with a variety of weapons built into his frame. He had a great deal of affection for Tia, and was overcome by grief and rage when she was killed.

{{Droid-stub}}
